title: The 'Footer & Foundation' Update
description: Redesigned footer organization  and added foundation pages.
changes: Added dedicated 'About Us' and 'Patch Notes' pages.

title: The Navigation and Legal Update
description: Added footer and legal pages for easier site navigation.
changes: Implemented footer for easier site maneuverability
Added 'Terms of Use' and 'Privacy Policy' pages

title: The Leaderboard Expansion
description: Introduced the nation-wide leaderboard system with school-specific playtime gathering.
changes: Full release of the school leaderboard UI
Connected all apps to the playtime tracker

title: Identity and Navigation
description: Complete overhaul of Bobmath's visual design, introducing app-layout in the iconic grid structure
changes: Rebuilt UI from scratch to support the growing library of games
Implemented category buttons to allow users to find apps faster
Standardized the Bobmath black and orange color scheme

title: Beginning of Bobmath
changes: Initial launch of browser-based app collection.
Optimized app scripts for Chromebook compatibility
